title: PKK - Create!
description: A Create-focused adventure modpack with new dimensions, expanded exploration, improved combat, and advanced storage. It blends mechanical engineering, atmospheric biomes, aircraft travel, and enhanced survival for balanced long-term gameplay.
body:
**⚙️ CREATE • EXPLORE • ADVANCE**

A next-generation modpack where automation, adventure, and aesthetic progression converge into a single experience.

**✨ What Awaits You**

Step into a world powered by the mechanical depth of Create and its many expansions. Build moving factories, automated farms, transport systems, and complex production lines that grow with your ambition.

Then leave the workshop behind and dive into realms beyond the ordinary:
🌌 Aether for skyborne exploration
🌑 The Undergarden for eerie, hostile depths
🌄 Dozens of new structures, dungeons, and handcrafted encounters

**🚁 Gear Up. Take Flight. Explore Further.**

Master traversal with Immersive Aircraft, glide across biomes, or descend into forgotten ruins.
Equip yourself with Immersive Armors, Epic Knights, and new creature overhauls for a more dynamic combat experience.

**🧰 Modern Tools for Modern Builders**

Your journey is supported by powerful logistics and storage systems:

Applied Energistics for digital networks

Storage Drawers and Sophisticated Backpacks for streamlined inventory

Performance boosters like Sodium, FerriteCore, Entity Culling, and more for a smooth world even at maximum content density

**🍲 A World That Feels Alive**

With Farmer’s Delight and many world-enhancing add-ons, settlements become richer, kitchens more creative, and survival more flavorful.
Every biome gains depth through ambience, lighting, fauna, decorations, and improved atmosphere.

_**🚀 Built for Players Who Want “More”**_

More automation.
More dimensions.
More exploration.
More style.

A balanced blend of tech, adventure, and visual immersion designed for long-term worlds, multiplayer servers, and builders who love both engineering and combat.

There are some mod's inside this pack that are not directly from modrinth, since they're from curseforge i'm gonna link them and give all credits to their respective creators in the same way i give credits to the creators of every other mod in this pack, apart from [Limited Spectator](https://modrinth.com/mod/limited-spectator) which is made by [karashi](https://modrinth.com/user/karashi), one of the creator of this modpack:

[Tax' Ocean Villager](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/taxoceanvillager)

[MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod: Refurbished](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture)

[Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework)

[Advanced Chimneys](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advanced-chimneys)

[Lovely Snails](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lovely-snails)
